NeverRanked.

Honolulu · research engagement

NeverRanked measures what AI answer engines cite for a category. The deliverable is a forensic research memo plus a prepped punch list your team executes against. We do not execute. That separation is structural.

What we used to be

Until May 2026, NeverRanked sold a JavaScript snippet that was supposed to drive AI citations. We ran a pre-registered kill test against our own domain. Zero citations out of 409. The LLM crawlers do not execute JavaScript, so the snippet was structurally invisible to them. We stopped selling that product and rebuilt the company around the measurement layer that does work.

What we measure now

Seven AI surfaces, every day. Five citation-grade engines that search the live web — Perplexity, ChatGPT search, Gemini grounded, Microsoft Copilot via Bing, Google AI Overviews. Two model-knowledge engines that answer from training data alone — Claude, Gemma. The two layers measure different failure modes a brand can have.

What we deliver

A research memo per category. Per query, per engine, per competitor, per source type. Plus a prepped punch list ordered by impact, written for the customer's team or their agency to execute against. Daily measurement runs in the background. Monthly delta memo on ongoing engagements.

Pricing

$4,500 kickoff per category (one time) plus $1,500 per month per category ongoing. Per category, not per client. No bundled tiers. A small five-query pilot on one category is offered at no cost as the wedge into the full engagement.

Security posture

The engagement does not touch your systems. No code on your property, no integration, no data flowing from your side. We observe the public AI engines from outside. This is a research engagement, not a software install — the procurement surface is an NDA and a vendor intake form, not a SOC 2 audit.

Where to dig in

Why we are rebuilding → (the full retraction story) What a $4,500 kickoff produces → (real example deliverable) About NeverRanked → Free single-page AEO check → (check.neverranked.com) Public source code → (github.com/LanceRoylo)

To scope an engagement

Email Lance@hi.neverranked.com with the category you want to measure and three to five competitors you want on the cohort. A five-query pilot runs at no cost so you see the shape of the deliverable on your data.

NeverRanked · Honolulu · founder-led, bootstrapped, rebuilt May 2026 after a public retraction · terms · privacy
